creator: riggs@rrr.de
text:
On Wed, 22. Oct 2008, at 10:40 +0200, Stefan Walter wrote
according to [Re: ports/124423: multimedia/mplayer detection of OSS Audio is faulty]:

> I assume Peter's problem has been fixed as I haven't heard otherwise. Can
> you have a look at the patch "VVD" sent in July? Should this or a similar
> change be committed?

Well, if this problem persists, we need to do something about it, no
question. But this patch needs a little work.

VVD, could you please try if it still works as it should when you use
only the second part of your patch?

What we still have to do is add the dependency on SSL in the port
makefile.

Riggs
